Must maintain all existing public API and pass all 3000+ tests. Per spec 48 (derived properties).

title: Spec 55: Life system Sense layer — Sensor capabilities + Memory engine
description: Per spec 55 (Evolution System). Phase 1: Implement Sense + Memory layers. 1) Sensor capability framework: define SensorCapability interface, signal types (API/GraphQL/MCP/UI/EventBus), signal normalization pipeline. 2) Memory engine: usage pattern accumulation, frequency tracking, baseline computation, drift detection. 3) Wire sensors to EventBus for signal collection. Core interfaces already exist (life-system.ts types merged earlier). This builds the concrete implementations. File areas: packages/core/src/life-system/ (new), capabilities/cap-sense/ (new). Must follow spec 55 sections 2-3 exactly.
closeReason: Spec 55 Phase 1 complete: Sense layer (SignalBus, defineSensor, CapabilityExtensions.sensors) + Memory layer (MemoryEngine, InMemoryMemoryStore, baseline computation, drift detection). 33 tests total (12 sense + 21 memory). Both builders merged.

title: Spec 52: AI Intent Resolution + Action Execution via natural language
description: Per spec 52 (AI Deep Integration) section 2. Implement AI Action Execution flow: 1) AI Intent Parser — takes natural language, uses OntologyRegistry to find matching action + schema, extracts parameters. 2) ActionProposalCard — UI component showing proposed action with confidence, missing fields, explanation. 3) User confirms → CommandLayer executes. 4) Server endpoint: POST /api/ai/resolve-intent. Must follow spec 52 exactly: human-in-the-loop, CommandLayer-only execution, permission-scoped, auditable. File areas: capabilities/cap-adapter-server/src/routes/ai-api.ts, cap-adapter-ui-react AI components.
closeReason: Spec 52 §2 AI Intent Resolution + Action Execution implemented. Server: enhanced resolve-intent with OntologyRegistry, added execute-intent endpoint, SchemaAIConfig + ActionAIConfig types, ExecutionChannel includes 'ai'. UI: ActionProposalCard component, AI Assistant integration with parallel intent resolution, resolveIntent/executeAction API functions. Both builders passed quality gates.

title: Spec 42: Config Center — runtime config management with versioning
description: Per spec 42 (Config Center). Implement centralized configuration management: 1) ConfigStore interface with get/set/history/rollback. 2) Drizzle-backed persistence with config versioning. 3) GraphQL API for config CRUD + history. 4) UI admin page /admin/config with edit form + version history. 5) Hot-reload support via EventBus config.changed events. Must not break existing ConfigRegistry — extend it. File areas: packages/core/src/config/, capabilities/cap-adapter-server/, cap-adapter-ui-react/.
closeReason: Implemented spec 42 Config Center dynamic layer: ConfigStore interface + InMemoryConfigStore + DrizzleConfigStore with versioning, _linchkit.config + _linchkit.config_versions system tables, hot-reload via EventBus, scope cascade. 18 new tests pass.

title: 三堂会审自动化：review gate + structured output + auto-fix flow
description:
实现自动化三堂会审（Gemini + Codex + Claude triple review）：

1. 增强 .overstory/scripts/multi-review.sh：
   - 输出结构化JSON: { verdict: PASS|FAIL, reviews: [{ reviewer, verdict, issues: [{file, line, severity, message, suggestion}], summary }] }
   - 支持 --json flag
   - FAIL时每个issue附带具体文件、行号、修复建议

2. 新增 .overstory/scripts/review-gate.sh：
   - merge后自动调用multi-review.sh --json
   - PASS → 正常继续
   - FAIL → 输出结构化修复指令到stdout，exit 1
   - 支持 --auto-revert: FAIL时自动 git revert 上一次merge commit

3. 修改 overstory-cli merge resolver (src/merge/resolver.ts)：
   - 在 onMergeSuccess 回调后、return之前，运行 review-gate.sh
   - 如果review FAIL，revert merge commit，返回 MergeResult.success=false + reviewIssues字段
   - config.yaml新增 merge.reviewGateEnabled: true, merge.reviewGateScript: .overstory/scripts/review-gate.sh

4. Lead/Coordinator 修复流（更新 agent-defs/lead.md + coordinator.md）：
   - merge FAIL due to review → 解析reviewIssues → 自动创建fix issue → 派builder修 → 修完后重新merge+review
   - 最多retry 2次，超过则escalate

File scope: .overstory/scripts/, overstory-cli src/merge/, .overstory/agent-defs/, .overstory/config.yaml
closeReason: Layers 1,2,4 complete (multi-review.sh --json, review-gate.sh, agent-defs, config.yaml). Layer 3 (overstory-cli resolver integration) escalated to coordinator — PATH_BOUNDARY_VIOLATION. Context injection addendum filed as follow-up.
